steps.title: Find the shared feature
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between the two National Wildlife Refuges. The notes say Crocodile Lake NWR protects the American crocodile and Pearl Harbor NWR protects the Hawaiian stilt, both endangered species.

steps.title: Reject one-sided or different facts
steps.content: Choice B mentions only Pearl Harbor NWR. Choice C emphasizes a difference in acreage. Choice D mentions only Crocodile Lake NWR and the national count, so it does not compare the two refuges.

steps.title: State the similarity
steps.content: Choice A explicitly links both refuges and says they were established to protect endangered species, which is the shared purpose the notes support. The answer is A.
